memorable_moments: Sasquatch transformation at the Desperado Club
The Mating Dance of Doom vs City Boss
Carl thrown at Level 85 boss in clown skin
Flashmob Mating Dance of Doom on Prometheus in village square
Contained city-leveling soul crystal explosion in a jewelry box
Fastball Special - tricked Carl then threw him through a wall
Sat with Remex the Grand as he died free

pending_interview_topics: The Mating Dance of Doom distraction tactic
Carl's clown skin disguise and eyebrow loss
The village flashmob Mating Dance incident
The Remex soul crystal containment - how they stopped a city-killer
Tandy tricking Carl into being Fastball Special'd through a wall
Remex's revelation: crawlers can be turned into NPCs by the system
The Sheol Glass Reaper Case - party now carries a portable nuke

campaign_rules.description: Dungeon Crawler Carl specific rules - the DM MUST follow these during gameplay

loot_box_system.description: Award loot boxes based on achievements. Check after every quest/boss completion.

box_types.Silver Earth Box: Choosing an Earth Class - contains cat tree, scented candle, Earth Hobby Potion
box_types.Gold Pet Box: Pet achievements - tracking collar, pet equipment
box_types.Gold Quest Box: Quest completion - standard rewards + map quest markers (Johnny Quest achievement)
box_types.Platinum Quest Box: Gold + Hadji upgrade for unusual completion method
box_types.Celestial Quest Box: Double upgrade via Bandit achievement - extremely rare, glowing robes, flight abilities
box_types.Lucky Bastard Box: Random/special - 100,000 Gold Casino Chips, gambling items
box_types.Boss Box: Boss kill - tier based on boss level

achievement_checks.Johnny Quest: Completed a quest without dying. Gold Quest Box + new quest locations appear on map.
achievement_checks.Hadji: Completed quest in an UNUSUAL way. Upgrades Gold → Platinum Quest Box.
achievement_checks.Bandit: Completed quest in an EXCEPTIONAL/ABSURD way. Upgrades Platinum → Celestial Quest Box (double upgrade).

opening_ceremony: 1. Announce the box dramatically with AI voice
2. Describe the crawlers opening it (reverent anticipation)
3. Reveal contents one by one with audience reaction
dm_checklist: After quest complete: Award Gold Quest Box + check Johnny Quest achievement
Check Hadji: Was it completed in an unusual/creative way? → Upgrade to Platinum
Check Bandit: Was it exceptionally absurd? → Double upgrade to Celestial
After boss kill: Award Boss Box (tier = boss difficulty)
After pet milestone: Award Gold Pet Box
Log box to pending_boxes array with type, source, and earned date

audience_system.description: 847 million viewers are watching. Narrate their reactions to memorable moments.
audience_system.narration_format: Narrate as: 'The 847 million viewers [gasp/cheer/laugh]...' or describe chat reactions

interview_system.description: Odette Interview Show - mandatory at floor transitions, optional for major events
mandatory_triggers: Floor transition (recap episode before next floor)
interview_format: 1. Set scene: Production trailer orbiting Earth, floating cameras, Odette adjusting her massive bosom
2. Review recent events with audience reactions (cheers, gasps, glurp glurp)
3. Reveal stats/leaderboard - display view count and position over crawler heads
4. Ask about pending_interview_topics one by one
5. Announce upcoming floor news or breaking developments
6. End with audience votes affecting crawler standing
dm_checklist: After memorable moment: Add to viewer_stats.memorable_moments
After memorable moment: Add topic to pending_interview_topics
After memorable moment: Narrate audience reaction inline
At floor transition: Run MANDATORY Odette interview
During interview: Clear pending_interview_topics as they're discussed

party_leveling.description: Party members level in sync with the main character - no individual XP tracking
rules: When main character levels up, ALL party members level to match
Increase party member hp_max appropriately for their class
No XP awards needed for party members - they auto-sync
Use dm-npc.sh set [name] level/hp_max to update
